__rationale__: Triggering fixture for SR-07: Vendor-mandated 5′ / 3′ adapter sequences for certain products (e.g., Twist eBlocks have universal flanking; IDT gBlocks have no fixed flanking; clonal genes have vendor-specific cloning-site flanks). The system MUST include or strip these flanks based on vendor profile and intended assembly chemistry.

construct.notes: T-405 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage; Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations.
